extracted_by: HivemindMinion (Claude Code) from HivemindOverlord's licensed PoE2 install
schema_notes: schema_version=1. English-only templates. Other 8 languages deferred to v2 (size).

Each description record: stat_ids (list — multi-stat blocks share one description), primary_stat_id (first of list), variants (list of {range, template, handlers}), primary_template (first English variant template, or null), source_line.
Variant range tokens: '#' = default/any, '1' = exact value 1, '10' = exact 10, '1|#' = [1, inf], '#|0' = [-inf, 0], '1|99' = [1, 99].
Template syntax preserves PoB conventions: '{0}' placeholders, '\n' newlines, '[InternalName|DisplayText]' for hyperlinks.
Handlers (e.g. divide_by_ten_1dp_if_required, negate, '60%_of_value') are preserved verbatim — consumers should apply them if interpreting numeric values.
v1 scope: root-level .csd files only. The per-skill descriptions under specific_skill_stat_descriptions/ are NOT extracted in v1 (separate large subtree).
no_descriptions captures stat IDs the game ships explicitly without display text — useful for completeness checking but not for explain_mechanic lookups.
data_policy: Extracted exclusively from the maintainer's licensed PoE2 install via the in-repo extraction pipeline. No third-party wiki / scraped data.
